jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - CREDAI - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
CREDAI, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CREDAI:
CREDAI is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CREDAI!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
